name: FinOps - Consumption Tracker
description: Throughput utilization and estimated credit consumption. Tracks daily ingest vs licensed capacity and estimates credits based on published per-GB rates.

config.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

search.query: dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="MB" | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="GB") | union (dataset="cribl_metrics" | limit 1 | project unit="TB") | sort by unit asc

config.markdown:
- **Throughput** — Daily ingest vs licensed capacity (quota)
- **Est. Credits** — Stream 0.32/GB, Edge 0.26/GB
- **Not included** — Infrastructure, Search compute, Lake storage
- **Quota Override** — Set in GB/day (0 = use license)

search.query:
dataset="license_usage" | mv-expand items | extend type="usage", val=items.inBytes / 1073741824 | project type, val
| union (dataset="license_info" | mv-expand items | extend type="quota", val=todouble(items.quota) | project type, val)
| summarize avg_daily=avgif(val, type=="usage"), license_quota=maxif(val, type=="quota")
| extend quota=iff($quota_override > 0, todouble($quota_override), license_quota)
| extend utilization_pct=round((avg_daily / quota) * 100, 1)
| project utilization_pct

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend daily_gb=items.inBytes / 1073741824
| summarize avg_gb=avg(daily_gb)
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 0.001024, "$byte_unit"=="GB", 1, 1024)
| extend avg_daily=round(avg_gb / divisor, 2)
| project avg_daily

dataset="license_info"
| mv-expand items
| extend quota=iff($quota_override > 0, $quota_override, items.quota)
| project quota

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend edge_gb=coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0) / 1073741824, stream_gb=(items.inBytes - coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0)) / 1073741824
| summarize stream=sum(stream_gb), edge=sum(edge_gb)
| extend total_credits=round(stream * 0.32 + edge * 0.26, 0)
| project total_credits

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend stream_gb=(items.inBytes - coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0)) / 1073741824
| summarize stream_credits=round(sum(stream_gb) * 0.32, 0)

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend edge_gb=coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0) / 1073741824
| summarize edge_credits=round(sum(edge_gb) * 0.26, 0)

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend _time=items.startTime / 1000, daily_gb=items.inBytes / 1073741824
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 0.001024, "$byte_unit"=="GB", 1, 1024)
| extend Daily=round(daily_gb / divisor, 2)
| project _time, Daily

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend _time=items.startTime / 1000, edge_gb=coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0) / 1073741824
| extend Stream=round((items.inBytes / 1073741824 - edge_gb) * 0.32, 1), Edge=round(edge_gb * 0.26, 1)
| project _time, Stream, Edge

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend _time=items.startTime / 1000, edge_bytes=coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0)
| extend divisor=case("$byte_unit"=="MB", 1048576, "$byte_unit"=="TB", 1099511627776, 1073741824)
| extend stream_val=(items.inBytes - edge_bytes) / divisor, edge_val=edge_bytes / divisor
| project _time, Stream=stream_val, Edge=edge_val
| timestats sum(Stream), sum(Edge)

dataset="license_usage"
| mv-expand items
| extend _time=items.startTime / 1000, in_gb=items.inBytes / 1073741824, edge_gb=coalesce(items.edge.inBytes, 0) / 1073741824
| extend stream_gb=in_gb - edge_gb
| summarize in_gb=round(sum(in_gb), 1), stream_gb=round(sum(stream_gb), 1), edge_gb=round(sum(edge_gb), 1), days=count(), stream_credits=round(sum(stream_gb) * 0.32, 0), edge_credits=round(sum(edge_gb) * 0.26, 0) by month=bin(_time, 30d)
| extend total_credits=stream_credits + edge_credits, avg_daily_gb=round(in_gb / days, 1)
| project month, days, in_gb, stream_gb, edge_gb, avg_daily_gb, stream_credits, edge_credits, total_credits
| sort by month desc
